---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/marvinschmitt
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marvin-schmitt-a85b321a2/  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# About Me

I am a PhD student in Statistics under the supervision of [Pierre E. Jacob](https://pierrejacob.org/) in the [Department of Information Systems, Data Analytics and Operations](https://ido-department.essec.edu/) at [ESSEC Business School](https://www.essec.edu/fr/).

**Research interests**: I am mainly interseted in methodological and theoretical aspects of Monte Carlo methods in, with a current focus on unbiased estimation of log marginal likelihood (log evidence) via path sampling and Markov chain coupling.

For correspondence and collaboration inquiries, please contact me at <a href="mailto:mohamed.keteb@essec.edu">mohamed.keteb@essec.edu</a>. I welcome questions and research proposals that align with my ongoing academic interests.
